description_long: This is a two-story suburban house surrounded by a wooden privacy fence, featuring a flat roof and a spacious yard. The front yard includes a small porch with steps, a main entry door, and several symmetrically arranged windows. The backyard is equipped with a round above-ground pool, a wooden gazebo, patio furniture, and a play area, as well as a cluster of trees and a pile of debris or rocks. The house exterior is primarily white with large rectangular windows on both floors, and the roof appears to have skylights or roof windows. The property is well-defined with clear boundaries and a mix of hardscape and softscape elements. The overall design is modern and functional, suitable for a family in an urban or suburban neighborhood.
description: A modern two-story white house with a flat roof, fenced yard, pool, gazebo, and patio furniture, featuring symmetrical windows and a welcoming entryway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry door, steps, symmetrical windows, and a fenced yard with a pool and gazebo visible to the left.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the backyard with a gazebo, patio furniture, play area, and a large pile of debris or rocks near the back fence.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the above-ground pool, gazebo, and a large tree, with the house's flat roof and upper windows visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the gazebo, patio furniture, and a clear view of the house's flat roof and side windows.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry with steps, small porch, and a single door flanked by windows, no columns or overhang.
